intro.summary: Study and Test the Entire Bible in a Year, Every Year
intro.instructions: How it works: Read daily, listen to audio, meet weekly...On the first day of every week (Sunday), we release the next week’s Bible study. It will take you all week to get through it if you even do. All of our subscribers gather on different days to discuss the Bible studies, so after the majority of our subscribers have finished their Sunday services, we update for the next week. All of the resources you need are available in the mobile app for free.

Torah: Genesis 1:1 | Six Days of Creation and the Sabbath
Genesis 2:4 | Another Account of the Creation
Genesis 3:1 | The First Sin and Its Punishment
Genesis 5:1 | Adam’s Descendants to Noah and His Sons
Prophets: Isaiah 42:1 | The Servant, a Light to the Nations
Writings: 1 Kings 11 | Prophecy of Israel and Judah's Division
Letters: Ephesians 2 | From Children of Disobedience into the Commonwealth of Israel
Colossians 2 | Beware of Traditions and Doctrines of Men
Revelation: Revelation 14 | Beware of Traditions and Doctrines of Men

commentary2.quote: There are few ideal families in the Bible. Jacob's certainly wasn't…
commentary2.content: Jacob's story reveals the struggle between flesh and spirit, and how God redeems broken circumstances through covenant promises...

deeper_learning.quote: Explore the prophetic connections between Jacob's ladder and the Temple Mount. This passage unveils YHVH's sovereignty beyond time and space...
